title: Bump storage to v1.61.0
body:
As the title says.  Bumping storage to v1.61.0 in
preparation for Podman v5.7

Based on @Luap99 's efforts prior, I'm planning to do this for the Podman v5.7 Vendor dance:

- Bump storage to v1.61.0
- After this PR is merged, create and push the storage/v1.61.0 tag
- In the same branch, create a new PR to bump image to v5.38.0, and vendor storage
- After the PR is merged, create and push the image/v5.38.0 tag
- In the same branch, create a new PR to bump common to v0.66.0, and vendor storage and image
- After the PR is merged, create and push the common/v0.66.0 tag
- Create a new PR in a new branch to bump all three project versions back to dev.

If this plan is off base, please holler!
<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->
